name: languages
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.languages.every(l => typeof l.code === 'string' && typeof l.name === 'string')
_note: translation.languages is a pure ISO 639-1 catalog read — no DB, no actor, no LLM. Always ok:true; count === languages.length. Public-read (in publicReadDomains so the UI dropdown loads unauthenticated).
